prose: Benzaldehyde Fukui reactivity indices computed via DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard) in gas phase using PySCF. Fukui dual-descriptor indices were calculated from atomic Mulliken charges in three electronic states (neutral singlet, radical cation, radical anion). Most electrophilic site: atom 3 (ortho-C, f⁺ = 0.39938964). Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (carbonyl O, f⁻ = 0.23839906). All Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptors (ΔΔf) reported for all 14 atoms. Charge conservation verified: sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000. SCF converged; integrity status ok, trustworthy.
